question: In 140_2021_34_1501_31724_Judgement_29-Nov-2021.pdf, what does the judgment say about "(emphasis supplied) 60. Therefore, on a combined reading"?
exact_answer_span:
These provisions incorporate the principle of express repeal – i.e., unless any provision of the CrPC is expressly PART C 53 (emphasis supplied) 60. Therefore, on a combined reading of Sections 4 and 5 of CrPC along with Section 30C of the MMDR Act, it is apparent that the procedure prescribed under the Code shall be applicable to proceedings before the Special Court unless the MMDR Act provides anything to the contrary.
